description_long: This is a sporty coupe car with a striking blue and white livery, featuring aerodynamic enhancements such as a large rear wing and aggressive front air vents. The body is low-slung with flared wheel arches, side skirts, and a sculpted hood with black vents for engine cooling. The car sits on multi-spoke alloy wheels with visible red brake calipers, suggesting high-performance braking capability. The windows are tinted, and the roofline flows smoothly into the rear, giving it a fastback appearance. The front grille and headlights are distinctively styled, with the iconic BMW kidney grille and dual round headlights. The rear features a prominent spoiler, dual exhausts, and detailed taillights, emphasizing its racing pedigree.
description: A blue and white high-performance coupe car with a large rear wing, flared arches, and sporty detailing, resembling a BMW race car. It features aggressive aerodynamic elements and a fastback roofline.
description_view_0: Side view showing the blue and white paint scheme, large rear wing, flared arches, and detailed wheels.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the BMW kidney grille, dual round headlights, hood vents, and wide stance.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the first, with clear visibility of the side skirts, wheels, and aerodynamic lines.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the large blue spoiler, dual exhausts, taillights, and rear bumper details.
attribute_window_configuration: two-door coupe with two side windows
